allow: Bash(node -e "const db = require\(''better-sqlite3''\)\(''scm.db''\); const row = db.prepare\(''SELECT id, name, bank_share, customer_share, total_amount FROM cases WHERE id = 2470''\).get\(\); console.log\(row\);")
Bash(node -e "const db = require\(''better-sqlite3''\)\(''scm.db''\); const cols = db.prepare\(''PRAGMA table_info\(cases\)''\).all\(\); console.log\(cols.map\(c=>c.name\).join\('', ''\)\);")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(''''bank_share'''' in d, d.get\(''''bank_share''''\), d.get\(''''customer_share''''\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const {getDb}=require\(''./db/connection''\); const db=getDb\(\); const r=db.prepare\(''SELECT create_date FROM fdm.fdm_transactions LIMIT 3''\).all\(\); console.log\(r\);")

Bash(node -e "const {getDb}=require\(''./db/connection''\); const db=getDb\(\); const r=db.prepare\(''SELECT id, source, source_label, mark_status, entity_type, entity_key, score, trigger_rule, case_id FROM fdm.fdm_transactions LIMIT 2''\).all\(\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(r,null,2\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const {getDb}=require\(''./db/connection''\); const db=getDb\(\); const r=db.prepare\(''SELECT COUNT\(*\) as total FROM fdm.fdm_transactions''\).get\(\); const statuses=db.prepare\(''SELECT mark_status, COUNT\(*\) as cnt FROM fdm.fdm_transactions GROUP BY mark_status''\).all\(\); const sources=db.prepare\(''SELECT source, COUNT\(*\) as cnt FROM fdm.fdm_transactions GROUP BY source''\).all\(\); console.log\(''total:'', r.total\); console.log\(''statuses:'', statuses\); console.log\(''sources:'', sources\);")

Bash(node -e "const db = require\(''better-sqlite3''\)\(''scm-api/db/scm.db''\); const rows = db.prepare\(''SELECT id, name, owner FROM cases ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 20''\).all\(\); console.table\(rows\);")
Bash(node -e "const db = require\(''better-sqlite3''\)\(''db/scm.db''\); const rows = db.prepare\(''SELECT id, name, owner FROM cases ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 20''\).all\(\); console.table\(rows\);")

Bash(node -e "const db = require\(''better-sqlite3''\)\(''./db/scm.db''\); try { db.prepare\(''ALTER TABLE case_comments ADD COLUMN from_review INTEGER DEFAULT 0''\).run\(\); console.log\(''Column added''\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\(e.message\); } db.close\(\);")

Bash(node -e "const db = require\(''better-sqlite3''\)\(''./db/scm.db''\); const rows = db.prepare\(''SELECT id, case_id, user_name, content, from_review FROM case_comments LIMIT 10''\).all\(\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(rows, null, 2\)\); db.close\(\);")
